case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. FRANCIS MARCELO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELO, FRANCIS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARCELO, FRANCIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 516 O'FARRELL STREET, UNIT #422 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, ** INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN-UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES **SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELO, FRANCIS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELO, FRANCIS DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED MAR-04-2014, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
